metadata.description: A unified library of AI prompt skills covering the full software development lifecycle. Language-agnostic and framework-flexible — works with Java, Spring Boot, Python, Django, ASP.NET Core, Laravel, PHP, Node.js, Rails, and more. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, SQLite, and MongoDB, and more.

plugins.name: devflow-skills
plugins.description: Full software development lifecycle skills — language-agnostic core pipeline with stack-specific variants. Covers requirement analysis, architecture, TDD, code generation, code review, performance audit, and commit workflow.
